name: Witch of the Black Forest
description: [Effect] When this card is sent to the Graveyard: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less DEF from your Deck to your hand.

name: Spirit Reaper
description: [Passive] Cannot be destroyed by battle. When this card deals battle damage: Your opponent discards 1 card.

name: Magician of Faith
description: [Effect] FLIP: Return 1 Spell Card from your Graveyard to your hand.

name: Morphing Jar
description: [Effect] FLIP: Both players discard their entire hands, then draw 5 cards.

name: Night Assailant
description: [Effect] FLIP: Destroy the strongest opponent monster.

name: Apprentice Magician
description: [Effect] When destroyed by battle: Special Summon 1 Level 2 or lower Spellcaster from your Deck in face-down Defense Position.

name: Torrential Tribute
description: [Trap] When a monster is Summoned: Destroy all monsters on the field.

name: Ring of Destruction
description: [Trap] Destroy 1 opponent monster. Both players take damage equal to its ATK.

name: Waboku
description: [Trap] Prevent all battle damage and destruction for this turn.

name: Jinzo
description: [Passive] Negate all Trap card activations and effects while this card is on the field.

name: Skill Drain
description: [Trap] Pay 1000 LP. Negate the effects of all face-up monsters on the field.

name: Imperial Order
description: [Trap] Negate all Spell Card effects on the field.

name: Graceful Charity
description: Draw 3 cards, then discard 2 cards.

name: Change of Heart
description: Take control of 1 opponent's monster until the End Phase.

name: Monster Reborn
description: Special Summon 1 monster from either player's Graveyard.

name: Delinquent Duo
description: Pay 1000 LP. Your opponent discards 2 random cards.

name: Confiscation
description: Pay 1000 LP. Your opponent discards 1 random card.

name: The Forceful Sentry
description: Shuffle 1 random card from your opponent's hand back into their Deck.

name: Exiled Force
description: [Effect] Tribute this card: Destroy the strongest opponent monster.

name: Swords of Revealing Light
description: Your opponent cannot attack for 3 turns.

name: Solemn Judgment
description: [Trap] Pay half your LP. Negate a Summon and destroy the monster.

name: Snatch Steal
description: Take permanent control of 1 opponent's monster.

name: Premature Burial
description: Pay 800 LP. Special Summon 1 monster from your Graveyard.

name: Call of the Haunted
description: [Trap] Special Summon 1 monster from your Graveyard.

name: Scapegoat
description: Special Summon 4 Sheep Tokens (ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position.

name: Fiber Jar
description: [Effect] FLIP: Both players shuffle their hands, fields, and Graveyards into their Decks, then draw 5 cards.

name: Cyber Jar
description: [Effect] FLIP: Destroy all monsters on the field. Both players excavate the top 5 cards, Special Summon all Level 4 or lower monsters, and add the rest to their hands.

name: Tribe-Infecting Virus
description: [Effect] Discard 1 card: Destroy all opponent's monsters.

name: Tsukuyomi
description: [Effect] Spirit. When summoned: Set 1 target monster face-down. Returns to hand at End Phase.

name: Sinister Serpent
description: [Effect] When sent to the Graveyard: Add 1 monster from your Graveyard to your hand.

name: Painful Choice
description: Send the top 4 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard, then draw 1 card.
